option.name: max_dimension
option._long: The maximium dimension for width or height of the preview, depending on which is larger.

option.name: frame_skip
option._long: Increase this value to skip frames, potentially improving performance at the expense of quality.

option.name: destroy_output
option._long: This option destroys the virtual output after 5 seconds. The downside is that on the first tooltip hover after the timeout, there is a slight lag spike. The benefit is that the virtual output is not shown in output management tools, and the mouse cannot be moved offscreen where it meets the rightmost output.
